name: Caramel Squares/Pecans and Chocolate Chips
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a jelly roll pan with whole graham cracker crumbs.
2. In a saucepan, melt together the butter and margarine. Stir in the brown sugar.
3. Boil the mixture for 2 minutes until it reaches the hard crack stage (300°F on a thermometer).
4. Remove from heat and stir in the chopped nuts.
5. Pour the mixture over the graham cracker crumbs, evenly spreading.
6. Sprinkle with chocolate chips.
7. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes or until set.
8. Cool completely before cutting into squares.
Very rich Freezes well.
